who: insurance brokers managing 10-20 claims per month
offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 claims per month, missed policy changes cause delayed claims approvals. We monitor policy changes and flag exceptions instead of manual tracking of policy changes through emails and documents.
problem: Inability to track policy changes leads to missed exceptions in claims processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM 20-50 brokers with a demo video
Participate in forums for insurance broker tools
try_it: Let users try manual policy change logging and exception flagging system on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
